settings.heading: Not a hair out of place.
settings.subheading: Sleeq Slick Stick tames flyaways, baby hairs and edges in one swipe — strong all-day hold, zero flakes, zero grease. Your slick bun's new best friend.

settings.title: Strong hold
settings.text: Salon-grade grip that lasts all day, even in humidity.

settings.title: No flakes
settings.text: Smooth wax glide — never crunchy, white or stiff.

settings.title: Nourishing
settings.text: Beeswax + castor oil condition while they hold.

settings.title: One swipe
settings.text: Mess-free stick — touch up anywhere in seconds.

settings.heading: Hold that loves your hair back
settings.text: We skipped the cheap stiffening agents. Sleeq is built on a beeswax base infused with castor oil and vitamin E — so while it grips every flyaway, it's conditioning your strands and edges, not drying them out. Non-greasy, no white cast, no crunch.

settings.title: Swipe
settings.text: Glide the stick directly over flyaways, baby hairs and edges.

settings.title: Smooth
settings.text: Press down with the spoolie or your palm to shape and slick.

settings.title: Set
settings.text: Done. Strong, flake-free hold that lasts all day.

settings.quote: Obsessed. My slick bun finally stays put through a full Joburg workday — no flyaways by 5pm.
settings.name: Thandi M.

settings.quote: Way better than gel. No crunch, no white flakes, and it actually smells nice. Lasts me ages too.
settings.name: Aisha P.

settings.quote: Got it for my edges and ended up using it on my brows and my partner's slick-back. One stick, whole house.
settings.name: Lerato K.

settings.question: Does it work on all hair types?
settings.answer: Yes — straight, wavy, curly and coily. It grips fine baby hairs and thicker edges alike, without flaking.

settings.question: Will it leave my hair greasy or white?
settings.answer: No. The beeswax-and-oil formula melts in clear and matte. A little goes a long way — start light and build up.

settings.question: How long does one stick last?
settings.answer: With everyday use, most people get 2–3 months from a single stick.

settings.question: How fast is delivery in South Africa?
settings.answer: We ship nationwide in 2–4 business days. Orders over R350 ship free.

settings.question: What's your returns policy?
settings.answer: If you're not slicked, message us within 30 days for a refund or replacement.
